headline: Meta falls as massive AI infrastructure spending plans overshadow chip progress
summary: Investing.com -- Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) shares declined 2.6% Thursday morning as the company’s ambitious plans to double its computing capacity reminded investors of the astronomical capital expenditures required to win the artificial intelligence race. headline: Apple Hands Broadcom a $30 Billion Lifeline as Trump Declares the Iran Ceasefire Dead
summary: Broadcom rallied on a $30 billion Apple chip commitment and Nvidia climbed on a value case, while a weak Amazon bond sale hinted at cooling AI-capex appetite. Overnight, Trump declared the Iran ceasefire over and U.S. strikes on more than 80 targets sent oil and Treasury yields higher heading into Thursday's open.

headline: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Stock Is Trading Up Today
